title: rosa viscaria var. pubescens
intro: Rosa viscaria var. pubescens, also known as the downy viscaria, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues, and has been used to treat various ailments. Rosa viscaria var. pubescens can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it may also be used as a tincture or added to topical creams for its medicinal properties.
